reference: I have a bald patch on my head and increased hair loss. What should I do to regrow hair on the patch and reduce hair loss? I had this condition when I was twenty-two, and some Ayurvedic treatment helped me. By the way, I am a female, forty-nine years old, and I am on thyroid supplements. The last time I checked my thyroid, which was six months ago, it was normal. Thanks.
